description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a natural wood grain finish and a modern, minimalist design. The left side features a vertical stack of four drawers with sleek metal handles, providing ample storage space. The right side has an open shelf area beneath the desktop, suitable for storing books, a computer tower, or other office supplies. The back and sides of the desk are fully enclosed with matching wood panels, giving it a sturdy and cohesive appearance. The desktop is spacious and flat, ideal for writing, working on a computer, or organizing documents. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, making it suitable for both professional and home office environments.
description: A modern wooden desk with four drawers on the left, an open shelf on the right, and a spacious flat top. The design is minimalist and functional, with a natural wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with metal handles on the left and an open shelf on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood grain panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the enclosed back panel and the open shelf structure on the left side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wood panel, mirroring the other side without drawers or shelves.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features four drawers on the left and an open shelf on the right, indicating this is the front of the desk where a person would sit and interact with the drawers and workspace.
